issues.sample: The contact owns a 2023 Yamaha MT-09. The contact stated that while stopped at a traffic light, the contact noticed a crack on the frame of the motorcycle. The contact stated that there was no impact to the frame to have caused the crack. The vehicle was not diagnosed or repaired

narrative.headline: What 2023 Yamaha Mt-09 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Structure (100% of reports).

issues.title: Structure
